rootCauseAnalysis.summary: Pod worker-6875fb79d9-q2zmj is crash-looping because the worker-config ConfigMap contains an invalid directive ('invalid_directive: true') that causes the demo-http-server application to abort immediately at startup with exit code 1. The ConfigMap was patched via kubectl at 14:55:15Z, simultaneously with a rollout restart, introducing the bad directive. Old ReplicaSet pods (worker-5ccfd4c787) remain healthy as they pre-date the change.
contributingFactors: ConfigMap 'worker-config' was patched to include an unsupported directive: 'invalid_directive: true'
Application logs confirm: '[emerg] invalid directive found in /etc/demo-http-server/config.yaml — aborting'
Container exits immediately (exit code 1) with zero runtime — startup config parse failure, not a runtime crash
A 'kubectl rollout restart' at ~14:55:15Z created new ReplicaSet (worker-6875fb79d9) that picks up the bad ConfigMap
Old pods from ReplicaSet worker-5ccfd4c787 remain healthy — confirming the ConfigMap change is the sole cause

Old ReplicaSet pods (worker-5ccfd4c787) remain healthy as they pre-date the change.
